# The CSO Toolkit Handbook {.unnumbered}

*One contract, three languages — reproducible analytics in R, Python, and Stata.*

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
[Download the handbook (PDF)](The-CSO-Toolkit-Handbook.pdf){.btn .btn-primary role="button"}
:::

This handbook documents the `cso-toolkit` contract. Start with the **[Introduction](introduction.qmd)**, then read the part that matches your role.
